Boutique CPA advisory for high-net-worth families, founders, and multi-generational wealth. Estate planning, trust returns, and multi-entity tax strategy under one roof.

Advisory Practice

Specialized Wealth Services

A focused practice for the complex tax lives of high-net-worth families, founders, and trustees. Discreet, deliberate, and built around your goals.

Estate & Gift Tax Planning

Lifetime exemption strategy, GRATs, SLATs, dynasty trusts, and family limited partnerships. We coordinate with your attorney to preserve generational wealth and minimize transfer tax exposure.

Trust Tax Returns (1041)

Complex trust filings including grantor, simple, complex, and charitable remainder trust returns with K-1 distributions.

HNW Individual Tax

Annual planning, AMT modeling, and QSBS strategy for individuals with multi-source income and concentrated positions.

Multi-Entity Tax Strategy

Holding companies, partnerships, and S-corps coordinated across jurisdictions to optimize after-tax returns.

Investment & Capital Gains

Tax-loss harvesting, opportunity zones, 1031 exchanges, and strategic gain realization around liquidity events.

Charitable Giving Strategy

Donor-advised funds, charitable trusts, and appreciated-asset donation planning to align giving with tax outcomes.

Track Record

Measured Outcomes

Boutique scale, institutional rigor. The numbers behind a quietly held practice.

The Firm

Quietly Held.
Carefully Considered.

Ashworth Capital CPA was founded by Big Four alumni who wanted to serve fewer clients, more deeply. Our partners hold both CPA and PFS designations and bring three decades of combined experience advising founders, family offices, and physicians.

We are not a tax-prep shop. Every engagement begins with a multi-year strategic plan and is supported year-round by a dedicated partner. Discretion is the foundation of how we work.

CPA LicensedPFS CertifiedAICPA MemberBig Four Alumni

Confidentiality on every engagement
How We Work

A Considered Engagement

Three phases. A direct partner relationship. No turnover.

1

Discovery

A confidential conversation about your wealth, family structure, business interests, and long-term objectives.

2

Strategy

A multi-year plan covering estate, entity, investment, and charitable strategy — with clear scope and partner accountability.

3

Stewardship

Year-round execution, quarterly reviews, and a single partner who knows your file in depth.

Client Voices

What Our Clients Say

“
Approaching the sale of my company, they restructured my holding entities and put a QSBS strategy in place that saved more than I had paid in taxes the previous decade. Their work was meticulous.
Tech Founder
Pre-Exit Planning
“
Our family has worked with them across three generations. They coordinate with our attorneys, our investment advisors, and our private bank — and quietly hold the whole picture together.
Family Office Principal
Multi-Generational Wealth
“
After 35 years in practice, retirement brought a tangle of trusts, IRAs, and a real-estate partnership. They simplified everything and built a charitable plan that finally feels intentional.
Retired Physician
Estate & Charitable Planning
